I remember the first time my dad had brought a Sony Walkman (borrowed from someone just for a day) and I listened to music on headphones.

It was mind-blowing to hear such clear sound coming out of such a small device!

When I think of that day, it fills me with overwhelming sense of gratefulness to be having a smartphone and earphones, and internet, and all the technology!

When I took a flight for the first time, and every time after that, I can't help but think back to the roots of humanity and feel the indescribable joy to be alive in these times!

If you're cognizant of your surroundings, and of your roots, you would value every little comfort you enjoy.

The tap water, the fan, the four walls and the roof, the bed you tuck yourself comfortably in.. Even if your home is small, or the bed is smelly. You've come a long way!

Life is wonderful!

Be grateful for everything. Say grace before your meals. Remember that people had to go hungry for days hunting and gathering food, and even then they didn't have food as good as what you get with a few taps on your device.

If you can't find things to be grateful for every day, heck, every moment.. Man, your life must suck!

May God bless you!

-

And if you're not happy with yourself today, then instead of the useless ruminations over the past, focus your energies on creating the future!

I'm grateful for the bad experiences; I don't regret them. And I certainly wouldn't want to change anything from my past

If she argues or debates it, she doesn't believe in you. She won't have faith in your ways, and you won't be able to lead her effectively.

Which will make the future life miserable for both of you.
God is the best idea that's ever come out of the human mind. And I say this with total sincerity. Believe in God.

Being your true self is in itself the greatest service you can do the whole.

"An enlightened person lives on the tune of Nature. He doesn't need to know what is moral or immoral."

Everything in life is gamble. Don't expect to be always able to make decisions that you'll never regret.

No matter what the adversity, never show frustration to your family. Show anger if required to tackle the problem, but never frustration or despair. A man's job is to be the pillar. You're not allowed to break.

Always act like everything is in control. Because you know what, short of death or terminal illness, everything is fixable with time and patience. Provided you maintain faith and continue to improve yourself and your situation.

The American political scene explained:


The American right is largely comprised of working-class people who want minimal government intervention in their economic activity. They believe in capitalism and in the American dream, where people get to enjoy the fruits of their labor.


The American left, on the other hand, is made up largely of socialists who, by definition, are anti-human flourishing because they misunderstand fundamental human nature. By advocating for taking away hard-earned wealth and redistributing it to unproductive people, they ultimately kill human motivation.


So if you only knew this much, you would assume that the rich and wealthy should naturally align with the right, while the poor should align with the left. But then you notice an anomaly. Why are so many of America’s tech millionaires and billionaires on the left? Does that mean the prior analysis is wrong? No.


Here is the key to understanding that anomaly: many tech millionaires and billionaires support the left precisely because they benefit from cheap labor. The left supports open borders and large-scale immigration, which benefits the economic interests of these corporations and billionaires. So their interests align with those on the political left.


But there is little doubt that, if allowed to continue unchecked, this alliance between tech billionaires and the left will fundamentally damage America.

For evolutionary purposes, we are designed to feel ourselves as the center of the universe, the world revolving around us. As an implication, for every unpleasant experience we have, we are much likely to blame others. (Don't you feel you are the victim? Everybody feels the same!) We should therefore always put ourselves in others' place and think through the situation to gain a good perspective, before we decide to lay the blame on someone.

When you realize how irrational you are, that's wisdom
Wallowing in love is not a privilege men have got.

I can’t imagine putting an average woman in a man’s body and being friends with that man. He’d be mediocre, if not insufferable


Women are tolerable only because they’re women


Don’t get me wrong, women are precious. And because they are precious, I don’t hold them to the same standard I hold men to. I don’t look to them for friendship, understanding, or shared quests. They’re not meant to carry that burden


Women are worthy of love, of being cherished, protected, and cared for… and that’s enough
Acknowledging the reality worse than your imagination is not pessimism. Pessimism is when you imagine worse than the reality.
Her stance on abortion is the most important thing you want to know when deciding on whether she’s fit to be the mother of your children
Selflessness that I refer to is but sublimest form of selfishness. For perfect selflessness is only possible in death.
The one who talks for truth does not compromise. Diplomacy is the business of the weak.

Do you ever wonder where you stand on the smart and savvy scale? Well, if get your news from the mainstream media—about anything—you’re on the lowest rung of awareness. Sheep level

Without exaggeration, everything important you hear in media is a lie designed to brainwash you
Individualism and freedom of thought are the enemies of the very values and morality which gave birth to them and elevated them to primacy among advanced nations. (Source)
If you don’t hate India, India is your standard and you are part of the problem.
Don't just talk to "the girl" and ignore the friend. Rather, talk to the friend and ignore the girl.

Women do have agency, but it’s shaped by the man they’re with


I’ve dated women who claimed they “don’t cook,” only to see them turn into amazing cooks once we were together


The same woman can become a tatted-up, blue-haired slut or an amazing housewife. It depends on the kind of man guiding her energy

Perfect communion (soul mates) is the meeting of egoless souls.

From What is perfect communion (soul mates)?

The world of intolerant liberal zombies will attack your livelihood if you express a non-PC opinion, thereby preventing you from being your best self.

It's more crucial than ever to be independent and aim to have FU money.

Do yourself a favor. Stop looking at WhatsApp statuses and IG stories of people. They are inane and have never added any value to your life. You're just being an addicted monkey and dimishinng your brains in the process.

Can you chuck the hunger for power, control and possession? When these questions are answered you will also know whether poverty can be removed.

From How poverty can(not) be removed?
The universe punishes the needy, and rewards the abundance mindset that makes one outcome independent
Thinking-from-heart is a phrase used by those whose brains are impotent.

Being in top 5-10% at five things will raise your odds of long-term success way higher than being the absolute best at one thing.

The former is also easy while the latter is near impossible.

Choose your way wisely.
Take your criticizers more seriously than your admirers. Because while admirers numb your reasoning ability, criticizers sharpen it.

This is important to remember:

Any time you're under too much stress or facing crushing challenges, remember that that's why your life is meaningful. You'll find the meaning once you're through it and have evolved as a result.

I have decided today that anyone who calls an elected leader of a country idiot is exposing their own lack of intelligence. Doesn't matter who the leader is.

We may disagree with their policies, they may even be evil,.. But if one thinks that an idiot nut job has become a leader, one doesn't have a very useful filter on life. Such people should be avoided for discussions.
If you're different from the other 99, either you're weird or the other 99 are losers. Whichever you think to be true is true.

When you live for other people's happiness you inadvertently want other people to live for yours. That screws up the whole thing. Ideally, you should look after your own happiness and let others look after theirs.

From Should we live for other people’s happiness?

Masses in the society need to be strategically conditioned (manipulated, brainwashed, as it were) all the time, while maintaining their delusion of freedom (i.e. not directly attacking their volition). If moralists can't do it, mass-media/corporations will succeed with theirs.

Men who are driven toward impossible missions and the desire to save worlds often find women to be a hindrance to the mission


Family life is completely desirable for the vast majority of people in the center of the bell curve. Not so for the outliers

I don't think women were EVER oppressed by men. That's not a thing

That said, groups of people have always oppressed other groups of people. This includes men to women, men to men, women to women, and even women to men Systemic oppression of women by men is a false narrative
Any addiction is sickness. Even if it is addiction to food. A fat person is addicted to food. They're sick.

Another way to identify a loser just occurred to me

When someone says “I’ll start something from certain day” for no other reason than the day happens to be start of a new week/month/year—assume that’s a loser

Today is as good a day as any if one really wants to start action

I understand why people do that, and in rare cases it may work too

But at least don’t talk about it until you have acted and actually made progress

Talkers before acting are almost always losers

I would never take pictures wearing a mask or face shield


These are not the accessories to flaunt with pride

I just realized that the bigger the emoji at the end of a sentence (🤣 > 🙂), the smaller the conviction behind what the person is saying 


It’s a mark of the try-hard

We hate Google, Twitter, Facebook, Apple, Amazon,.. and yet we use their products, services, buy stuff from them, in one way or another.. because we have no choice, they control so much of our ecosystem


That's exactly what slavery looked like
Don't offer unwanted advice. It won't be received and you'll lose respect.
When you consume mainstream media, you form mainstream opinions. You become mainstream person. In other words, average.

People believe you not because you're telling the truth. They believe you because they want to believe you.

Persuasion is about making people want to believe you.

#persuasion

Don’t get frustrated by your woman acting like a kid with you


If she isn’t acting that way, that’s should worry you

When someone tells you how to be happy and what is good for you etc., check whether the party is selling you any product. If yes, don't take it seriously, and don't allow it next time. The world would be much better, and people happier, if we could just implement this little change in our lives. (Applies to almost all TV ads.)

Whether you believe in Deity/God, Intelligent Design, Simulation Hypothesis, or Order-In-Chaos, it makes you a believer. We're all believers.

Humans NEED beliefs to function.

And that's okay.

Unpopular opinion:


In the end, non-meat eating cultures will lose to the meat eating ones


🍗🥓🥩🍖💪🏻

I have just realized this, and now it’s hard to stay loyal to the culture that forbids eating meat


Because that’s self-sabotage

I understand the compassion argument for being vegetarian/vegan and think that’s a valid reason for not eating meat—so long as those people also understand they are choosing to remain weak and prone to sickness for the sake of not harming other animals


Personally, I recognize how nature works and don’t think depending on other animals for survival is cruel


There are better ways to obtain meat than factory farming which is cruel (e.g free range animals, hunting,..)

Denying that meat is THE FOOD and consuming it is infinitely more beneficial than consuming any plant based diet is foolish 


People believing plant based diet is superior to meet are brainwashed by the big food industry and their health prospects are hopelessly bleak

Lastly, it is possible to not just survive but live virtually disease free only eating red meat and nothing else


Try that with any plant based food of your choice and you won’t last a year

Fun fact:


90% of all plants are inedible. They’ll cause serious harm if eaten


90% of all animals are edible


Still think nature made plants for human consumption? Good luck!
The skills, knowledge and attitude that got you where you are today will not get you to the next level. Always be upgrading yourself to meet new challenges.

Saying that one can't love animals and eat meat is like saying one can't care for the environment and use transportation that pollutes it, or that one can't love Nature and live (because living is exploiting Nature).
An enlightened person is a lunatic by choice with a perfect awareness.
Any meaning of life is a delusion. This very knowledge would make a great difference in the way one lives life.
Only woman who is obediently dependent on a virtuous man is worthy of respect. An independent woman is no good for society or for herself.

Listen to criticism more keenly than you listen to praise.

That said, also look at who's criticising you. Not everyone should have the power to sway you.
Don’t be mad that there are so many fools in the world, because if there were no fools, intelligence won’t have any value

He who thinks life is difficult and unfair to him (unless he’s being inflicted physical pain on by others for no fault of his) is the most deluded person, and on top of that, destined to be a loser in life

You can surely call pleasant coincidences your “good luck” and unpleasant ones your “bad luck”, but there is no reason to think that something miraculous as luck governs your life.

From Do you believe in luck?
Shaming is important as a soft punishment for noncriminal but immoral acts.
Mockery is the way of the shallow and the fake. If one has objection to someone or something, one should be able to present it in a rational and structured way like one really understands it.

Your life is your responsibility. The day you realize no one is going to help you, that’s the day of the rising


Most people don’t grow not because they have little support from others, but because they have too much of it

A nihilist would say: It doesn't matter in the vast universe whether you live or die. So die! An enlightened person would say: Yes, it doesn't matter in the least. That's exactly the point. Why try to change what IS!

Leave India


Or at least work your ass off, so your children can
I don't have any individuality other than being a truth-seeker. If you are truer than me, I will change to be you.

Women don't care if you have the same interests as hers. If you think THAT would attract her to you, you're are surely going to fail. All that matters to her is alpha male qualities.

Confidence, charisma and non-neediness.

Remember, #WomenAreNotMen

As a man, your pain is yours to bear alone


Don’t share it with your woman, she’s counting on you to be her rock


Don’t share it with your parents, they’re done taking care of you, it’s your turn to take care of them


Don’t share it with your friends, they have their own pain


You’ll be tempted to share your pain with others, but remember, as a man if you do so, it will only bring you disappointment and alienation 


You might get short-term comfort, but when the illusion fades, it will turn you bitter towards reality—or worse


Reframe your pain as a fuel instead


The more of it you deal with alone, the stronger and wiser you will come out on the other side


That’s the only right way to deal with your pain as a man

Never jump into the stock or crypto markets during a bull run. If you’re already in, hold steady, but don’t add to it


The real money is made when everyone’s selling, not buying. I’ve learned this the hard way


Keep cash ready, wait for the bear market, and pounce on quality stocks then. Avoid FOMO—especially with Bitcoin in this bull run


If you don’t have it, don’t buy it now

Sustained physical comfort is achievable only when you're willing to let go of mental comfort

Because that's what it takes to build a (physically) comfortable life

Mental comfort should never be the goal

That would be a death wish!
If you're obsessed with life, truth is absurd. If you're obsessed with truth, life is absurd.

If you think nerdy women are attracted to nerdy men, you couldn't be more mistaken.

No woman worth banging is attracted to a nerdy man.

Next time you hear a woman talk about National Geographic, don't join into the conversation thinking she'll have the hots for you now that you've found common interests.

You'd do much better just by teasing her.

There’s no such thing as “lasting happiness”. The thing which is closest to the idea of lasting happiness is contentment.

From What is perfect happiness?

Indian parents who're financially dependent on their kids have already failed, and yet they think they're wise just because they're older


They'd ignore advice from the very kids who pay the price for their mistakes. The arrogance!

"It's our culture!"

This culture is repulsive

People wonder why Indians are so successful in the West but India remains behind No one's looking at the elephant in the room: a culture where parents can be fucktard failures but their kids must sacrifice their dreams and freedom to support them

Society should spend more time shaming parents for being dependent on their children than shaming children for not taking care of their dependent parents


That kind of society will make progress, because children will not be weighed down by the financial burden of their parents


Now, I’m not saying that children shouldn’t take care of their parents. Good children should absolutely take care of their parents, but it’s also true that good parents should live their lives in such a way that they don’t become burdens on their children so their children don’t have to take care of them in the first place


In India, parents actually take pride when their children grow up to be responsible and take care of them, and they proclaim that as proof that they’ve raised good children


But don’t you see the height of narcissism in that? Instead of giving credit to their children for being good, for stepping up and taking care of them, they want to steal that credit for themselves


If your children have to take care of you, you shouldn’t be proud of yourself as a parent, you should be ashamed for stealing life of your children
Truth is my God, rationality my religion and my faith in it is the worship.

People who say life is meaningful only because it’s finite, because one day we’re going to die and that creates a drive in us to achieve something, should think again


I’m with @bryan_johnson, the “Don’t Die” guy


Think about how many things excite you to wake up every day. That project you’re working on. That woman you’re going to ask out. That soccer match you’re looking forward to next month. Or the new iPhone you’re going to buy. You get the drift


How often are you actually thinking about death? Most people barely think about it at all. And yet they still have countless reasons to wake up and kick ass in life


Meaning does not require mortality

Purpose of one's existence = the thing that brings one the most fulfillment in life

The purpose of a man's existence is to serve the mankind. The purpose of a woman's existence is to serve an alpha man.

Others will see you as you see yourself

Laugh at yourself and get treated as laughingstock

No self respecting man will indulge in self deprecating humor

Do people who cry victim all the time, and say EVERYBODY is against them, ever realize that that says more about them than about the people?

If everybody hates you, maybe the problem is with you

Design a life such that your best days are always ahead of you


ALWAYS

If you don't eat right, exercise and sleep 8 hrs a day, that will cause problems you may not even realize


Nearly all of your life's problems can be traced back to neglecting health by failing in one of those areas

Women love being called 'sexy' but when men tweet with her pic 'would bang' they're all outraged, not realizing it's the same.

'Sexy' literally and essentially means 'inducing sexual urge'. If I call you sexy, I'm saying I would like to have sex with you.

True love, unlike romantic love, comes at a huge psychological cost of defying the Universe (natural forces) for greater ''human goals'' (family and life-long companionship). Only the best and the greatest human beings can achieve it.
A woman can not fulfill the purpose of her life through career.

Naturally, men want respect and women want love. That’s how it’s supposed to be


But modern culture has feminized men so much that men now want love, and women are asking to be respected


They’re doing it all wrong, it’s against their natures. No wonder relationships are difficult
Marriage seems to have become outmoded in today's melieu. After a few generations humans will have evolved to be comfortable without the security of marriage and family. Or so we hope.

I think it's because men are more logically based and disagreeable than women. Therefore, it's natural that men will put forth counterarguments, or "mansplain", more often.

It's not necessarily a bad thing. Humanity has progressed because of it. https://t.co/XUkU5Th3ff

Men who aren’t successfully married and raising a family shouldn’t be voicing opinions on patriarchy, women empowerment, or gender dynamics


Bro, STFU! If you haven’t made it work yourself, you clearly don’t understand what the dynamic between men and women should be for a healthy society


Okay, maybe that was too harsh. Sure, you can share your opinions, but don’t expect credibility.


You’re only credible if you’re successful with women, and that means having a happy marriage and raising a family
However intelligent you may be, if it does not get you fulfillment in life then it's all a waste.

Lack of free will is not a new revelation. Religions have been saying it for centuries (everything's in the hands of God) and people were fine with it. The fact that we can't control things isn't depressing. Depressing is the knowledge that no one can. I think religions handled this delicate issue quite nicely compared to what neuroscience is doing.


I might have given the wrong impression that I side with religion. Just to be clear, I am with science and truth any day. That^ remark is just about the apathy with which science handles the issue of free will, undermining the human nature. Something which (I guess) religion dealth with in a better way.

How ironic it is that those who are deluded that life is meaningful are bent on ruining it for everyone and those who are aware of the absurdity and meaninglessness of existence are trying to save the world!
Happiness is also when you cry a river watching The Pursuit of Happyness.

Anytime your woman tells you to do something, take it as a shit test because, at a subconscious level for her, that’s what it is. Every time you listen to her and do what she tells you, her attraction for you goes down

She secretly wants you to do what YOU want to do and just hopes that it aligns with her wishes. When it doesn’t align, she’ll try to get you to do things her way. In that case, your best move is to make it feel like you changed your mind to do the other thing, not because she told you to do it
There is no such thing as life partner. Believing someone to be your life partner assumes absolute devaluation of the person.
Happiness is an attitude, not an objective state of mind.

We are in a computer simulation (like a video game) where it is possible for you to reach any height if you keep learning and improving yourself every step of the way. Everything around you is unreal, only you are real, as in have autonomy. The world is yours. Play well, win!

No sweet talks, no cute faces, no amount of great sex, not even passion of love… In the end, only the respect for your thoughts will provide you the highest meaning. More than anything else, look for people who respect you for your thoughts (for you are what you think).
Happy in love is being emotionally high. Sooner than later one would hit the ground. That's where one must find happiness that is normal.

The more successful a man is, the more failures he’s had


Remember this when you’re afraid of failures 


Big success is reached through a long ladder of learnings


So be grateful for every failure and make full use of it by deriving the most learning out of it

Life hack: When you come across a new book that intrigues you but you aren't sure if it will be a good investment, seek out podcasts the author has done

They would cover everything that book contains, minus the boring details. More fun in less time than you'd spend with the book

I don’t have a problem with vegetarians/vegans who don’t want to eat meat out of compassion for animals


But those who think meat is unhealthy and the food they’re eating is the right food are deeply ignorant about nutrition—and worse, brainwashed
Among philosophers honesty, most of the times, is the only choice. Two philosophers, therefore, can have qualitatively far superior relationship than (with) non-philosophers, I have experienced.

Thorough philosophical and spiritual development through formal education may be a solution. But it's not as convenient (and I doubt if it will even be as effective) as religion has been in moral guidance to the humanity.

entry.title: Options
entry.content:
Enter keyword and hit ENTER



Archive
Subscribe
Note

DarshanChande.com

Hormones-induced romantic love is the lowest form of love; irrational, and just meant for mating. Then there's this love as in "liking something very much"; it's a reason based love; good to go with. And the highest form of love is the unconditional love, which just means total absence of hatred and infinite compassion; it doesn't ask anything, anything at all.
Never fail to express gratitude when you feel it inside.

People who are most concerned with their own happiness are the people who are most miserable. That's just how it is. Happiness is the the art of living for oneself through living for others – family, community, society,..

A woman will do anything for you when you're operating from a position of power. But you'll lose her if you operate from neediness.

If you're operating from a position of power, when a woman doesn't give the expected behavior, you apathetically withdraw your attention to bring her back in line.

As against that, if you get offended and show her that you are, she will know that it's she who is in the position of power. You're then operating from a position of neediness.

There's a difference between withdrawing attention by being butthurt and doing so apathetically. One reeks neediness, another reeks power and options.

Never show a woman that her behavior has offended you. Simply ghost on her, and play it cool if and when she corrects herself. More often than not, she will.

Showing offence and sulking is the surest way to lose her attraction in an instant.

It will boggle your mind how instantly she will lose attraction. Like a light bulb switching off with a click.
There is always at least one criterion by which everyone discriminates between people. Absolute non-discrimination is impossible, and even unfair!
Strength to accept the reality only comes through awareness.

No one today in their right mind can believe what they tell you about the present 


And you're asking me to believe hundreds and thousands of years of history? 


That's a joke!
Taj Mahal is a symbol of EGO, not love.
When your real life is better than dreams, you’ll be excited to get up early and start your day
He who seldom suffers is worse off for he doesn't know how to cope.

Never stop pursuing something thinking you can't achieve it because genetics

If we are simulations—which I think we are—then geneticism is crap

I see losers all the time blame their unhealthiness or inability for getting in shape on genetics

Losers!
Lack of choices, not love per se, is the secret of lasting marriage. A society that celebrates freedom and choices is bound to see the decline of marriage and family.

Don't be trapped in the mental prison of self imposed identity

"I'm introvert"

No, you are what you think you are. If introversion is not working for you, grow out of it

Become extrovert, because you can. Fake it till you make it

Matt Ridley’s The Rational Optimist is packed with insights, but damn, it’s a slog. Spent 15 hours reading it vs. two hours of a Joe Rogan podcast—learned way more from the podcast


Books? Overrated. Podcasts? The ultimate hack for learning

Too much comfort and prosperity is not good. Without struggle and suffering happiness soon loses its essence, and ennui takes place, which is worse than any suffering. It's then that man takes to "extreme living" to keep from getting suicidal. It's not only deprivation that would turn man into psychopath, but excess comfort too.
Wisdom is the result of critical thinking. Or else it is borrowed wisdom.
Morality is nothing if not instrumental to wellbeing and growth of humanity.

When the Right demands free speech, it’s with the intention to prevent harm by getting the info out to people

When the Left demands it, it’s always with the intention to spread degeneracy and harm society

WE ARE NOT THE SAME
Everyone has great power. But few have great will to discover it.

I’ve long held that LLMs and the human brain are fundamentally the same, except that the human brain is orders of magnitude more sophisticated. Today I had an epiphany that further solidified that conviction.


Many smart people have argued that art created by AI will never truly appeal to humans because an essential component of art is that it’s created by humans. That’s why a painting made by a machine doesn’t feel like art to us, while something hand-created does. I agree that art is art because it’s a product of human intelligence.


But here’s the thing. Have you noticed that humans are already enjoying AI-generated content? Have you heard AI-generated music? I have, and it’s mind-blowing. Instagram is flooded with AI-generated reels, and people love them.


How is that happening?


Because AI isn’t simply a machine. At a fundamental level, it operates the same way the human brain does. The fact that humans connect with AI-generated content suggests that the human intelligence doesn’t see AI as something separate from itself. Intelligence recognizes intelligence. It recognizes its own.

A spiritualist can not solve any problem of the world, because contentedness with the way of the world is the hallmark of spiritual development. Solutions, if at all, are found by seeing problems as problems. But a spiritualist is too mature to be bothered by anything but what affects his personal peace.

Am I starting to like Mark Zukerberg because I really understand him or because the people I take my cues from have started talking positively about him?

This is the type of question everyone should be asking themselves
Only hangout with people who are better than you at least in one area where you'd like to improve yourself
I am yet to see a profile with pronouns in their bio make sensible argument for anything or display outstanding virtue

The only people who are benefiting from the existence of different countries are politicians. Where politics is more important than truth any hope for peace is futile.

From Why do you love your country?

If my wife has to work to supplement my income so that we can have a "good" life, I'd feel like a failure. I'd find ways to make more money so that my wife can live in the comfort of home and the family that she nurtures.

It's sad that most women are scared to be housewives!

Respectability of job today is decided by how much money it pays. That's so wrong. It should instead be decided by what knowledge/skills it takes to hold that job, how it treats you, and how it benefits the society as a whole, among other things. An accountant making 10k/month is living a more respectable life, in my view, than an undergraduate call center zombie making 30k/month.
Don't ever argue with fools. This is even more important if the fool is your boss.

Scott Adams defined consciousness as the ability to predict your next moment and then compare the actual moment to your predicted one, reassess, and predict the next moment again


This process, constantly happening every moment, is consciousness. I found this conceptualization of consciousness to be quite ingenious

Here’s another ugly truth: Sexual instinct rules your decisions (to a good extent!).

From What counts, outer looks or inner beauty?
It's not what I am getting in life. It's what I am doing with what I have got, that decides the quality of my life.
When you are wrong you feel it in your heart but it's your ego that does not let you understand / accept it.

Getting redpilled and learning game won't help you get the woman you're in love with. It will help you not fall in love, thereby increasing your chances with her. If you fell in love, it's over! #women #game #redpill

There's one political side who will hate you if you love your family, your people and your country

If you're on their side, you're not on the Right side

Can a teacher who’s a brokie claim credit for it when his student grows up to become filthy rich?


If you think yes, you have the mindset that keeps you from being filthy rich
The head needs certainty to work; but the heart is erratic. What one must, then, work out is flexible certainty.
If you have 1000 failures before a success, that's perfectly normal. Do not let failures exhaust you.

After smoking experimentally for two years (a pack a day) - and having quit for ten months now - I have concluded that smoking is not an addiction, it's a HABIT.

Calling it addiction is a rationalization (excuse) smokers give themselves for not being able to - nay, willing to - quit.

Habit, easy to break, but addiction.. sympathize, people! Sorry.
To secure and maximize your own well-being is your first moral obligation.

If you don’t have a good muscle definition, you don’t deserve a good looking woman


Saying as someone who’s himself not quite there yet


But truth be told
Doubt his wisdom who always expresses himself through others' quotes.
To live life and not understand it is more healthy than to understand life and not live it, but less healthy than to understand and live life.
Err on the side of too much self confidence rather than too little. If you fail, fail like a winner.

Just because women don't rape doesn't mean they are all virtuous. Many women I talk to say that they wear short clothes to feel good about themselves, not to 'provoke' men. Well, if a woman 'feels good' by revealing her skin then that itself is perversion#. But alas, modern mindset is so conditioned that even to point it out costs one dearly (if one is socially invested). We live in the times where many vices are accepted as virtues.

# Perversion is anything that disrupts society's functioning, **natural forces in humans considered**.
Marriage is the best solution available to the human condition. For it provides everything humans crave; from sex to security to meaning in life.

Spend time with losers and you'll be a loser

Spend time with winners and you'll always be primed to win 

You are the average of 5-10 people you spend most of you time amongst

Whether offline or online
Putting trust in people is a lame way of getting yourself a sense of security.
Miserable souls await festivals. He who is fulfilled celebrates life.

A person using a calculator would be much more efficient than a person not using one, and generally would be better regarded. We don't say he is less intelligent for it

Now replace calculator with AI. Using AI is indispensable. Don't resist

I don’t mind reading a book or an article written by AI as long as it contains valuable ideas or insights and there’s a real person behind the prompting


In the same way that I don’t mind buying furniture that is machine-made

The ability to manipulate your own mind is the biggest hack to happiness


In fact, it’s the only one there is
He who is proud to be a human is a moron.

A modern woman can not be happy because she wants to be happy like a man. Media and feminist propaganda have brainwashed her to think that dependency and subservience towards man is oppression, hence she is not happy in marriage. She wants to rather be "strong and independent" and enjoy all freedom that the society affords men. This serves her well for a while, but once youth and beauty alienate her post the age of 30-35, she recoils into emptiness and depression and effectively becomes a living zombie.

Woman: Will you miss me when I'm gone?
Man: (smirking cockily and pointing to his penis) Give me something to miss you for.

I’ve never understood self-harming as a way of fighting for a cause 


Gandhi was a nutcase


It’s a feminine way at best, childish at worst 


How narcissistic you have to be to think your enemy cares that you’re hurting yourself!


You’re making your enemy’s life better by self-harming; they’d rather wish you went all the way to finish yourself 


What a loser way to fight for a cause!
I think the major reason why it is difficult to be virtuous, especially for men, is because virtuousness is not a good currency in the sexual market that life fundamentally is.
Indians are the pollution of the human race
A woman's body is a shop, their mind is the shopkeeper, and their vagina is on sale. This should explain women's behavior. Sexual Economics.

The quest for perfection isn't futile just because perfection as one conceives it doesn't exist. Only he who seeks perfection on the first place can truly understand that it is not, and thereby come to terms with imperfection – which in a way is real perfection.

The One Definition of Love


Love is a word that is used in many different contexts. Love between couples is different than love between siblings, which is different than love between parents and children, which is different than how you love your neighbor or how you love humanity.


You may not talk to your friend for years, but you may still feel the connection, the love. You may never hug your parents, but you may still be there for them. That’s love too.


So, can there be one definition of love that encompasses all these different variants of love in all contexts?


Yes, and I’ve got it for you. Maybe you’ll hear it for the first time, but when you hear it, you’ll see how simple it is and how much it makes sense.


Love is the ability and the willingness to sacrifice.


When you are willing to sacrifice something, be it your time, your financial resources, or your mental energy, when you’re willing to take on any sort of inconvenience for someone else, that’s love.


Now let’s test this out.


When you’re walking down the street and you see a beggar and give them money, you’re parting with money. That’s love. You may have a bitter relationship with your parents, but if you provide for them when they need it, that’s love. When you decide to carry trash in your pocket instead of throwing it on the street, you are taking on some inconvenience. That’s love for your surroundings, for your country.


Love is the willingness to sacrifice. That’s it.

How Can You Be Bored in the Age of the Internet?


I’m old enough to have spent my school days and teenage years in a time when there were no smartphones and no internet.


I was a knowledge seeker from the beginning. I used to collect factoids from newspapers and magazines and write them down in notebooks. I have notebooks filled with factoids that I collected over the years, along with hand-drawn diagrams and everything.


I even started compiling my own dictionary once… until I stumbled upon a real dictionary and it blew my mind that something like that already existed.

Now imagine: you have a mobile phone in your hand with the entire world’s knowledge at your fingertips. You want to know something? You don’t have to wait weeks or months, visit libraries, and rummage through books to find it.


Back then, many people had questions that remained unanswered their whole lives because of lack of time or resources.


People would have these miraculous moments when a question they’d carried for years suddenly got answered by chance — in some magazine, newspaper, or TV program. And even then, there was no way to fact-check or verify if it was true.

But now, with the internet, you can find almost any answer in minutes and research it further.


First came the internet… and now on top of that, there’s AI. So you don’t just get an answer — you can debate it, discuss it, and analyze it deeper.

So why am I saying all this?


Because I see people getting bored today, and I wonder — how on earth can you be bored in this era when you have a phone with internet in your hand?


(By the way, I wouldn’t be bored even without a phone — that’s a whole other story.)


But if you have internet on your phone and you still say you’re bored… what a pathetic life you must be living.

I lose respect for people who say they don’t judge anybody, that they’re completely non-judgmental.


Because they’re liars


If you have a moral compass, if you hold any values at all, you are bound to judge society or groups of people against those values.


That’s what the brain’s primary function is: to judge your surroundings so you can optimize for your well-being in the environment.


To not judge, to be totally non-judgmental, is to not have any values at all. What do you stand for then?


Now, I also see the value in being non-judgmental in social interactions. 


So my position is that you should not judge any individual you’re interacting with, because everyone has personal reasons, everyone and is a sovereign individual. Unless they are directly harming you, you should not judge them.


For example, in my value system, feminism is bad. But if a feminist is speaking to me kindly, I’m not going to be judgmental in that interaction. I’ll extend friendliness, keep an open mind, and try to understand their individual point of view.


But zooming out, I can still hold the opinion that feminism is bad, and feminists on the whole are harming society. 


You must judge society and groups of people if you are a thinking person. If you say you don’t do that, you’re a liar.


But at the individual level, you should be completely non-judgmental if you want to be sociable.


Those two positions don’t have to be mutually exclusive.

You may hate me for saying this, but I will say it. When people in other countries cannot tell by looking at me and my wife that we are from India, I take it as a blessing.


When I have to say that we are from India, I feel a tinge of embarrassment, because I see how Indians behave everywhere and the bad reputation they have for their utter lack of civic sense. India needs a massive upgrade in this regard. And this is not just about the lower classes—even the rich are often obnoxious when it comes to civic behavior, both abroad and at home.


Bad behavior is so deeply ingrained in us that sometimes when I look at my own videos, I cringe. I try to eliminate these behaviors that surface unknowingly, subconsciously. It’s actually a good thing that I record myself through vlogs, because it helps me identify and get rid of these “Indianisms.”

Since high-value men don’t select ugly women, and beta males are not high-value enough, both these groups (ugly women and beta males) have only one recourse: to double down on feminism.


That’s why most feminists are ugly, fat women who would be childless and perpetually unhappy, and weak beta males who think pedestalizing women will get them laid (it won’t).
Not abstinence, nor overindulgence, but moderation is the way to handle instincts.

In a couple of days a woman can go from "I can't live without you" to "..." (you don't exist) if you act beta enough (show too much love).

If you act beta she will be confused (because she can't rationalize her repulsion) Spare her the agony and maintain the I-don't-care alpha frame.

There is a difference between protecting the minority and pedestalizing them


The latter is seldom done by well-intentioned people. Rather, these are virtue-signaling snakes with vested interests


Respect the majority in any land—or you’re provoking  nature!

entry.title: Search
entry.content: Search by keywords:
Sparked from Jevons paradox, I have a theory that the more efficient technology we make available, more of our energy will be sucked in by it. And I think I am not wrong. Many offices now work 24x7.
Facts matter, only to strengthen your confirmation bias after you've made up your mind based on emotions.

Spirituality views the world as a part of "the whole". Its focus is so much on the whole that it never really connects with the problems of the world. Only (non-)remedy it offers is for people to stop being people and merge into the whole. SPIRITUALITY IS HOKUM.

If you have time to have text conversations with people beyond a few mins, you’re a loser


And if you’re having text conversations with women beyond setting up logistics for meeting in person, you’re a special breed of loser
A man saying he wants to marry for support in old age is such a shame. It's a woman's argument for marriage.

Ask the dietician:

With regards to bodyfat which is the culprit, bread or butter?

If the dietitian says butter, you need to fire her.

The point is, one needs to get rid of carbs, not fat, from their diet if weight loss is the aim.

People didn't get fat because they overfed on fat. They got fat overfeeding on carbs/sugar.

Bread is plain carbs that turns into sugar that turns into fat in the body. It's also non satiating simple carbs resulting in overeating.

Butter, otoh, is satiating and slow digesting food which is hard to overeat. And rich in healthy nutrients.
Remember that if your bad day wasn't as bad, your good day wouldn't feel as good!
No successful person of essence would advise you to "be yourself". This lazy,  feel-good phrase is a self-improvement advice of and for losers. It's the worst advise!

Before putting anything in your mouth ask yourself, are you really hungry? Do you really have to eat?

GUARD YOUR MOUTH FROM YOURSELF.

When it comes to free speech on a public square, you're either an absolutist or a denier

There's no middle ground 

If you're against certain type of speech, you must either be God, or a tyrant
I'm old enough to remember that "fat shaming" was fun. Today calling fat people fat is politically incorrect, is hate speech and can get you banned from social networking websites. #ClownWorld

Life is an ongoing problem


So if your education is also not ongoing then you’re bound to get slapped by life at some point 


That’s a certainty

Put this on your phone’s wallpaper so you see it 100 times a day


When a woman tells you her problem


DO NOT OFFER SOLUTIONS!
Sin is a misdeed committed consciously.

If you live to make your woman happy, your woman will hate you 


Because the last thing she wants is to be happy


Happiness for women is not straightforward like it is for men

Trump needs to win not to save democracy but to reclaim it

Democracy is already gone in 2020, and for that reason you can't be sure he will win, no matter the polls, the policies, or the size of his support
The only deciding factor is the size of the cheat from the other side
Sugary tea is the most underrated poison most Indians fondly drink at least twice a day
God is a computer programmer
Don’t eat foods that come in a packet. Don’t eat food that your grandfather didn’t eat

People who are bored by philosophy, but often complaining about something of life are big turnoffs to me. They are like kids, narcissists, who don’t want to understand why something is problematic but only want to have their way, or cry.
Not changing your opinions over many years is not something to be proud of

Pervert man : Rape
Pervert woman : ?

If you think the answer is 'Rape' you are mistaken. The answer is 'provocative' behavior including, of course, skimpy clothes.

Cont..
Having knowledge without good intentions is useless. Having good intentions without right knowledge is lame.
If watching porn is perversion then having sex is the height of perversion!
Reading blogs is more time efficient than reading books. Moreover, most books can be condensed into a few short blog posts.

Speculation alert: When AI becomes super-intelligent, it’ll solve all problems, make energy abundant, and everything will be possible


Life becomes meaningless. So we’ll create a simulation just to feel something, find meaning


And that’s probably exactly what we’re living in now. Sims inside Sims!
Avoid temptation to tell your plans to people
The people who don't have the capacity to become a govt must not have the power to break the existing one.

Looking for (romantic) love? Remember: need* is the mother of failure. (*poorly-managed need.)

Ironic, but true. That's why "romantic love" is inherently doomed venture.
Uncle whom I met after many years: So you still don't believe in God? / Me: *smile* / Uncle: What? / Me: You still know to ride a bicycle?

In your teens, you should be into sports. In your 20's you should be into movies. In your 30's you should be into making money


That's some bullshit!


You should ALWAYS be into making money. Entertainment is for losers!

The people who irritate me the most are those who don't want to: understand life, face bitter truths, use rationality,.. They would perennially wallow in misery, blaming others for their unhappiness. And what's more, they think The Big Daddy will grant them Heaven to make up for their misery on the Earth. Don't know whether to pity them or give them a slap on the face. Narcissistic little brats!
Not judging is not caring.
Anyone saying he doesn't fancy leveraging his accomplishments towards impressing/attracting more women is being dishonest at some level.

When people sacrifice their leisure time for owning more of materialistic things (e.g. working overtime because I want an iPhone), that society is plagued by alienation, the disease of modernity.

More leisure time means more time spent with friends and family. But when one doesn't have real human connections, what is one to do? Where is one to derive the meaning from? Then consumption becomes their goal, and work provides the meaning.

No one has ever quit a bad habit by hanging out with "friends" who had that habit

Be wise about choosing company
Everytime you see your peers put junk & ciggeratte in their mouth and you don't, imagine yourself growing bigger in size and them shrinking.

A man who does not have the drive to marry and create family is a like a king who doesn’t want a kingdom


He rejects his very purpose, loser

The feminine essence that is honed by millions of years of evolution


She’s designed to seduce (the right kind of men)


Damaged men are attracted by fake beauty


https://twitter.com/copyrodeo/status/1409175896272130050?s=21
Not good wishes, nor compliments, nor devotion, nor kindness, not even love... The only thing that wins me is uncorrupted intelligence. For that would include every other emotion in refined form.

In desperation dumb mistakes are made. Whether it's persuit of women or wealth, if you are desperate you won't get it.

If you really want something desperately, try not being desperate about it if you want to have a shot at getting it.

Notice this pattern in your life

The more desperate you are to get something, the more it will elude you

The specific outcomes that you can live without are the only ones that will actually materialize

Universe will give you what you want - when you don’t *need* need it

I just gave you the hack, the cheat codes if you will
People you don't like are also the people you need, for they are the people that teach you the most.

Is there any scientific reason that the left is so unbelievably ugly?
https://x.com/Jetskigrizzly/status/1826320252491497604

Left = Victim mentality, which is inherently ugly; and when they're ugly on the inside, they'd tend to change their outward appearance to reflect their inner world

All things good and beautiful are repulsive to the leftist woke mind
Everyone starts as an amateur. What is important is how you end up.
The only truly happy man is a wise man; otherwise a drunkard is also happier than the average.
The only difference between a spiritually developed person and an ignorant person is of the underlying awareness; and not necessarily of actions.

There is no such thing as true self


People are work in progress every day of their life


(Example) A poor man is also as himself as what he becomes after getting rich.


People always behave how their circumstances allow

The size of an economy means nothing without progress where it counts—per capita income, infrastructure, education, and civic sense


On those metrics, Japan is miles ahead of India. Time to wake up and fix the real issues

A man who takes more than he gives isn’t just “living his life”—he’s a burden. To society, to his family, to the world


Being a man means being a net positive. If you’re not, you’re breaking the unspoken contract with everyone who depends on you. Pathetic!
I don't believe in the rule of "majority wins". Because often I have seen that majority is situationally right, but FUNDAMENTALLY WRONG.
Spiritual development is a journey from painful loneliness to blissful aloneness. Everything in between is but illusions.

I grew up hearing video games are bad. Adopted that belief as an adult. But looking back, I’ve craved them my whole life—played tons at friends’ places since I couldn’t afford my own. And honestly? No negatives


Logically, they train problem-solving, hand-eye coordination, and even boost IQ. Winning at games = solving complex problems = enhanced brain


The key is balance. If gaming takes over your life, it’s bad. But as a healthy component of life, video games can be a game-changer

Regret is a loser's emotion. "I did something I shouldn't have. I made a mistake." Sadness. Loser!

Winners know that mistakes are learning. Learning is improvement. And improvement is a path to victory.

There are no mistakes, only lessons. Cultivate the winner's mindset. Live without regrets.

“The future belongs to India” is bullshit


AI is going to widen the gap between intelligent and unintelligent people because intelligent people have just gained more leverage, whereas unintelligent people will continue doing the same unintelligent things. 


What this means for India, since India is a low-IQ country, is that the gap between high-IQ developed and civilized countries and low-IQ countries is going to widen even further. I’ve been saying that India is not decades, but centuries behind properly civilized countries. In the decade to come, that gap is only going to widen.


If you’ve been believing the bullshit that the next 20-30 years belong to India, you’re going to be disappointed. You’re going to see the stuff of nightmares happening around you.


The only way to secure the future of your family is to start preparing to get out of India, or at least send your children abroad. 


I’ve already started moving my investments from Indian stocks to the US stock market, and will continue to split my SIPs. I don’t believe in India.


I hope I’m wrong.
